articles.title: Hormuz crisis reignites as Tehran targets UAE and US hits Iranian fast boats
articles.body: Oil jumps to $114 and Treasuries sell off amid deepening conflict in Middle East

articles.title: The oil price crunch is looming
articles.body: The longer the Strait of Hormuz blockade continues, the more likely a crisis-like adjustment in rich economies becomes

articles.title: We're adding to our position in a stock that has gotten cheaper since earnings
articles.body: The company's earnings report wasn't perfect, but the long-term story is still intact.

articles.title: ‘Misplaced euphoria’: Markets are sleepwalking into a recession amid Iran war oil price shock
articles.body: As US equities hit fresh highs, strategists warn that investors are downplaying the impact of soaring oil prices.
